reviews.comment:
Hermosa! La parte del ACA es perfecta para sentarse a tomar algo o comer ahí! El café es riquísimo y te lo sirven muy lindo! Ricas medialunas y buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful! The ACA section is perfect for sitting down for a drink or a meal! The coffee is delicious and served beautifully! Delicious croissants and great service!

They deserve a raise.

reviews.comment:
Lugar muy cómodo con amplios ventanales que dejan ver el lugar de estacionamiento, comida muy bien elaborada. Sillones cómodos y aire acondicionado acorde.

(Translated by Google)
Very comfortable place with large windows overlooking the parking lot, very well-prepared food. Comfortable armchairs and adequate air conditioning.

reviews.comment:
Gran estación de servicio. No les pongo 5 estrellas pq ahora el compresor de aire hay que garparlo

(Translated by Google)
Great service station. I'm not giving it 5 stars because the air compressor needs to be paid for now.

reviews.comment:
Excelente las chicas que atienden el full..son un amor siempre con buena onda y alegría .somos clientes de ese lugar porque nos gusta su trato y amabilidad.super recomendado

The girls who work there are excellent...they're always lovely, friendly, and cheerful. We're regulars because we love their service and kindness. Highly recommended.
